title: Escalate Abnormal Critical Lab Values
summary: Detect critical lab values, determine whether escalation has already occurred, and prepare urgent next steps.
problem_statement: Critical lab values require rapid escalation and documented follow-up but can still be missed in busy workflows.

inputs.name: lab_text
inputs.description: Critical result text or structured lab summary.

inputs.name: completion_state
inputs.description: Whether the result has already been acknowledged or escalated.

rule_sets.summary: If the lab text indicates a critical value and no closure is recorded, mark urgent and prepare escalation.

examples: Potassium 6.4 mmol/L, critical high. Please notify responsible clinician immediately.
